title: Senior Product Manager, Notifications
description: Own the vision, roadmap, and execution of Spring Health's unified notifications platform. Transform Spring's fragmented communication systems into a scalable, reliable, and self-service platform.
keyResponsibilities: Own strategy, roadmap, and execution of unified notifications platform
Define logical communication models and data contracts
Partner with Engineering to consolidate multiple systems
Build self-service tooling for internal teams

title: Associate Director, Product Data Science
description: Lead the product data science team at Spring Health, focusing on discovering growth opportunities through experimentation and enabling the R&D team to execute on them.
keyResponsibilities: Set vision for product data science driving growth
Partner with Product, Design, and R&D teams on metric tree
Design and refine product data science team operations
Manage and develop team of data scientists
requirements: 10+ years in analytics or data science roles
3+ years managing data scientists or product analysts
Deep experience with A/B testing and experimentation
Fluent in growth thinking and funnel analysis
Experience with modern data stack (dbt, Looker)

title: Director of Product Management, Patient Experience
description: Lead strategy and execution for patient-facing applications including patient intake funnel, patient portal, and customer insights portal. Manage and mentor a team of product managers.
keyResponsibilities: Own vision, roadmap, and OKRs of patient experience products
Optimize patient intake funnel and portal
Lead creation and launch of customer insights portal
Work across engineering, design, marketing, sales teams
Manage and coach team of 2 product managers
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Business, Engineering, CS or related
8+ years in product management (3+ in leadership)
Success in healthtech and marketing platform SaaS preferred
Track record of product launches and GTM execution
Experience managing and mentoring product managers
